title: Keto Italian Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy keto stir-fry dish made with roasted vegetables and Italian seasonings.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Italian sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the roasted bell peppers and cook until tender.
Stir in the tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh basil.
